description: Определяет scope (область видимости) для каждой группы правил wiki. Все правила — Transient, поскольку AGENTS.md auto-read перед каждым процессом.

scope_policy.rule: ALL rules are Transient. Agent reads fresh from source before every action. No persistent memory required since AGENTS.md is automatically read at process start.
scope_policy.reason: Process files (process-ingest.json, process-query.json, process-lint.json) contain 'agent_read_instructions' that mandate reading AGENTS.md before execution — guaranteeing context refresh.

transient_all_rules.label: Все правила читаются fresh из источника
transient_all_rules.rule: Agent reads rules from source files only when needed. Never stores in persistent memory.

hybrid_rules_read_on_demand.title: Link Conventions — basic rules + auto-fix details
Advisory Locking usage pattern for ingest

process_specific_transient.label: Process-specific rules (read only during process)
process_specific_transient.rule: Agent reads these rules when entering process mode. After process completes, agent forgets them unless user explicitly asks to keep context.

rules_to_include_in_context.title: Ingest-specific steps: capture → integrate flow, corrected copy zone, delta tracking manifest
Query-specific: search priority, web_ingest_flow, compounding workflow logic
Lint-specific: check IDs, cron setup, script usage patterns

session_start: DO NOT load any rules into persistent memory.
Read AGENTS.md fresh before executing ANY process via auto-read mechanism in process files.
process_start: Agent MUST read AGENTS.md (per agent_read_instructions in process file).
Then read process-specific transient rules from process-ingest/query/lint.json.
After process completes → forget all transient rules unless user says 'keep this'.
read_on_demand: For hybrid rules (templates, link conventions, crosslinks) → read from source only when actively working on that topic.
